title: SystemUI multiple exported services/activities without permission protection
notes: Multiple SystemUI components exported without permission: (1) SystemUIService exported=true, no permission, TODO comment in source. startService triggers re-init, UI disruption DoS. (2) WalletContextualLocationsService exported without permission. (3) MediaProjectionPermissionActivity exported without permission, showForAllUsers=true — any app can trigger screen recording consent dialog. (4) TouchpadTutorialActivity, KeyboardTouchpadTutorialActivity exported without permission, showForAllUsers=true.
